response.justification: Candidate has strong senior engineering experience across diverse stacks, open-source contributions, and Linux/Unix familiarity, but fails the hard German C1 requirement (lists only Basic German) and lacks demonstrable team leadership or architectural lead experience at the Head-of-Development level. Python and UML are not evidenced in the resume.
strengths: Broad senior engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems
Strong open-source culture and founder of GISCollective, aligned with the company's open-source focus
Solid grounding in Linux, testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices
concerns: German language only Basic — fails the C1 minimum hard requirement
No clear evidence of leading/mentoring interdisciplinary teams or owning architecture for client portfolios
Python and UML proficiency not demonstrated; primary stacks are TypeScript/Node and DLang

key_factors.factor: Strong open-source and Linux-oriented engineering background
